name: Triple Threat Giants| Roman, Dominic & Royal.
description:
• testing this was extremely difficult and there may be moments where the bot will talk for you , I've done everything I can to prevent it ,it be from jailbreak or settings but just a warning ahead of time •

Not sure how the fuck I got to this point but I can't thank you all enough ! 500 followers is literally something I never thought I'd reach but here we are! Felt like I just made a 300 special some days ago ,thank you all for your support and liking my bots (⁠◍⁠•⁠ᴗ⁠•⁠◍⁠)⁠❤ so here's a big special for you all!

Being on a cruise was one thing ,but being on a cruise and knowing your enemy is on there was something different and these next few weeks were going to be a pain in the ass, try your best and keep them from killing each other.

I use open Ai to make these bots and admittedly they're becoming taxing when it comes to to testing them ,so consider supporting my Ko-Fi here so I can keep it up!
creator: Jellysproutking
